message:
feat(freeze): Add put_arg and set_arg with operand (u16 index)

Adds support for put_arg and set_arg opcodes that use a u16 operand
for argument index (unlike put_arg0-3/set_arg0-3 which use implicit index).

- Added put_arg and set_arg to codegen_ssa.zig emitInstruction()
- Added put_arg and set_arg to emitTrampolineInstruction()
- Added put_arg (size=3, pop=1, push=0) to verify_opcodes.zig
- Added set_arg (size=3, pop=1, push=1) to verify_opcodes.zig
